name: Sorting Nuts Puzzle Game
description: Welcome to Sorting Nuts Puzzle Game, a fun and colorful sorting challenge! Dive into a relaxing world of nuts and bolts where your goal is to match and organize colors correctly. Each level offers a satisfying puzzle experience that improves your focus and thinking skills. Enjoy smooth gameplay, vibrant visuals, and increasingly challenging levels as you progress. Whether you want to relax or train your brain, this game is perfect for every mood. Sort all the nuts correctly and complete each level with strategy and precision!
instructions: Tap to select and move nuts Match nuts of the same color Plan moves carefully to avoid getting stuck Complete all levels to win
